subcodes.first_line: Verily, the Book proclaimeth: O tribes of the earth! By the life of the All-Bountiful One, the Day of Return hath come! Cast aside what ye possess and take [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الکتاب ینادی یا ملا الاحزاب لعمر الوهاب قد اتی یوم الماب ضعوا ما عندکم و خذوا
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @chastisement and requital
